title: Phlebotomy Technician
description: UCSF Health is seeking a Phlebotomy Technician to draw blood specimens in our Kansas City location. Work on-site in a leading academic medical center, providing essential patient care services.
responsibilities: Draw blood specimens from patients following proper collection procedures
Ensure patient safety and comfort during blood draws
Label and process blood samples for laboratory testing
Maintain proper infection control and safety protocols
Document collection information in patient records
Handle and transport specimens according to protocols

requirements.education: High School diploma or GED; Phlebotomy certification course completion
skills: Phlebotomy techniques and blood draw procedures
Ability to work in fast-paced healthcare environment
certifications: Phlebotomy Technician certification (CPT or equivalent) required or within 6 months

benefits: On-site position at UCSF Health Kansas City
